programmes.show_description: This is CBBC! Tune every day from 7.00am.

Pat the Horse. Patrick wants to be a horse!

programmes.show_description: 24-Carat Chocolate. Grizzy finds a sceptre that covers anything it touches in gold.

Fun-Sized Friends. SpongeBob and Patrick exchange tiny living versions of themselves.
Max v Machine. Max's disdain for his new automatic cat feeder leads to a machine revolution.

A Slippery Situation. A slimy beast has made the Crystal Mine her home, cutting off the forest's crystal supply, so the heroes must go on a slippery quest to evict her!
